name: html_landing_page
description: 5-turn coding agent: build a complex single-file HTML landing page

turns.label: Core structure
turns.content:
Create a complete, single-file HTML landing page for a SaaS product called 'FlowOS'. Requirements:
1. Sticky navbar: logo (text), links to #features #pricing #contact, a 'Get Started' CTA button.
2. Hero section: animated CSS gradient background (shifting hues, keyframe animation), large H1 headline 'Ship faster. Break nothing.', subtitle, two CTA buttons ('Start free' primary, 'See demo' ghost).
3. Features section (#features): 2x2 grid of 4 cards, each with an inline SVG icon, title, and 2-line description. Topics: Fast deploy, Real-time logs, Auto-scaling, Zero downtime.
4. Pricing section (#pricing): 3 tiers — Starter $9/mo, Pro $29/mo (visually highlighted with accent border/badge), Enterprise (custom price). Each tier: 5 feature bullets, a CTA button.
Use a dark color scheme: background #0a0a0f, cards #13131a, accent #6c63ff, text #e2e2e2. No external dependencies. Embed all CSS in <style>. Output only the complete HTML file.

turns.label: Counters & animations
turns.content:
Extend the HTML page with:
1. A stats bar section between the hero and features: three counters — '10,000+ Users', '99.9% Uptime', '150+ Integrations'. Each counter should animate from 0 to its target number when it scrolls into view (use IntersectionObserver). Show the label below each number.
2. Smooth scroll behavior when clicking any navbar anchor link (CSS scroll-behavior: smooth is fine).
3. Feature card hover animation: translateY(-6px) and a stronger box-shadow. Transition 0.25s ease.
Return the complete updated HTML file.

turns.label: Dark/light mode toggle
turns.content:
Add a dark/light mode toggle to the page:
1. Add a toggle button in the navbar (before the CTA). Use a moon icon (🌙) for dark, sun (☀️) for light as button text/label.
2. Implement via CSS custom properties: define all colors as var(--bg), var(--card), var(--text), var(--accent) etc. on :root for dark mode, override them on [data-theme='light'].
3. Transition: add 'transition: background 0.3s ease, color 0.3s ease' to body and cards so the switch is smooth.
4. Persist the choice in localStorage ('flowos-theme'). On page load, read it and apply before first paint (to avoid flash).
Return the complete updated HTML file.

turns.label: Contact form with validation
turns.content:
Add a contact section (#contact) before the closing </body>:
1. Section title 'Get in touch', subtitle text.
2. Form fields: Name (text, required), Email (email, required), Subject (select dropdown with options: General inquiry / Bug report / Partnership), Message (textarea, min 20 chars).
3. Real-time JS validation: validate each field on 'input' and 'blur' events. Show a red error message (<span class='error'>) below the field when invalid; remove it when valid. Green border on valid fields, red border on invalid.
4. Submit button disabled until all fields are valid. On submit: preventDefault, show a success toast notification (bottom-right, fades out after 3s).
Return the complete updated HTML file.

turns.label: Pricing modal with checkout
turns.content:
When any pricing CTA button is clicked, open a modal overlay:
1. Backdrop: full-screen semi-transparent dark overlay with backdrop-filter: blur(4px). Click backdrop to close.
2. Modal card (max-width 420px, centered): show plan name and price at top, then a checkout form with fields: Cardholder Name, Card Number (auto-insert a space every 4 digits as the user types, max 19 chars displayed), Expiry MM/YY (auto-insert slash after 2 digits), CVV (max 3 digits, type=password).
3. 'Confirm Payment' button: on click, enter a loading state (show spinner, disable button, change text to 'Processing…'). After 1.5s simulate success: close modal, show a toast 'Payment successful! Welcome to FlowOS.'.
4. Close (×) button top-right of modal. ESC key also closes.
Return the complete updated HTML file.
